nasb.text: and if Christ has not been raised, then our preaching is vain, your faith also is vain.

esv.text: And if Christ has not been raised, then our preaching is in vain and your faith is in vain.

cnv.text: 如果基督沒有復活，我們所傳的就是枉然，你們的信也是枉然，

ccb.text: 如果基督没有复活，我们所传的就是虚空，你们所信的也是虚空。

csbs.text: 如果基督没有复活，我们传道就是虚空，你们相信也是虚空。
